title: cynorkis citrina
intro: Cynorkis citrina, also known as the yellow-flowered orchid, is a species of orchid native to tropical Africa. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly its rhizomes, which contain bioactive compounds with potential anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Cynorkis citrina include its use in traditional medicine to treat various ailments such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory infections, and its extracts have also been shown to exhibit antioxidant and immunomodulatory activities. Herbal preparations of Cynorkis citrina are typically made from its dried rhizomes, which can be used as a decoction or infused in water to harness its medicinal properties.
